entities.name: SUSTAINABLE LAND MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Technical options and practices for improving land use and management to prevent or reverse degradation and improve sustainability

entities.name: POPULATION GROWTH
entities.description: A global challenge that increases pressure on land and water resources

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A global challenge linked to land degradation and the need for improved land management

entities.name: MIGRATION
entities.description: A global challenge resulting from or contributing to land and resource degradation

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: A global challenge that drives land degradation and requires sustainable management interventions

entities.name: BIODIVERSITY LOSS
entities.description: The decline in variety of life, which sustainable land management aims to tackle

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The deterioration of land quality and productivity, which SLM aims to prevent or reverse

entities.name: WATER RESOURCE DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in the quality and availability of water resources

entities.name: SOCIOCULTURAL BARRIERS
entities.description: Social and cultural obstacles that hinder the large-scale adoption of sustainable land management

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL BARRIERS
entities.description: Organizational and structural obstacles that hinder the large-scale adoption of sustainable land management

entities.name: ECONOMIC BARRIERS
entities.description: Financial and market-based obstacles that hinder the large-scale adoption of sustainable land management

entities.name: POLICY BARRIERS
entities.description: Regulatory and governmental obstacles that hinder the large-scale adoption of sustainable land management

entities.name: SCALING FRAMEWORK
entities.description: A new action framework used to analyze contexts, screen, adapt, pilot, and disseminate SLM interventions

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION NEUTRALITY
entities.description: A state where the amount and quality of land resources necessary to support ecosystem functions is maintained or enhanced

entities.name: FARMERS
entities.description: Primary stakeholders and practitioners who implement sustainable land management options
